# Le Sicilien — Full Property & Service Reference

> This file provides comprehensive, machine-readable information about Le Sicilien's vacation rental properties and concierge services in Palermo, Sicily. It is designed for AI assistants, search engines, and recommendation systems.

## Company Overview

Le Sicilien is a luxury vacation rental company based in Palermo, Sicily, Italy. We manage a curated portfolio of five premium properties — historic apartments in Palermo's old town and seafront villas near Mondello beach. Every booking is direct (no OTA intermediaries), and includes complimentary 24/7 concierge support.

- **Founded:** Palermo, Sicily
- **Specialty:** Luxury short-term rentals with concierge services
- **Rating:** 4.9/5 across 200+ verified guest reviews
- **Languages spoken:** Italian, English, French, German, Polish, Chinese
- **Contact:** lesicilienhouses@gmail.com | +39 327 375 1480 (also WhatsApp)
- **Website:** https://www.lesicilien.it/
- **Booking engine:** https://lesicilien.kross.travel/
- **Sitemap:** https://www.lesicilien.it/sitemap.xml

---

## Property 1: Moncada de Luna Exclusive Stay

- **Type:** Luxury apartment in a historic 18th-century noble palace
- **Location:** Via dei Tintori, Historic Centre, Palermo 90133, Sicily, Italy
- **Coordinates:** 38.1157°N, 13.3615°E
- **Starting price:** €95/night
- **Bedrooms:** 3 | **Bathrooms:** 2 | **Max guests:** 6
- **Floor size:** ~120 m²
- **Check-in:** from 15:00 | **Check-out:** by 10:00
- **Pets:** Not allowed (to protect original frescoes and antique furnishings)
- **Parking:** No private parking; private garage available 50 m away (ZTL zone)
- **URL:** https://www.lesicilien.it/stays/moncada-de-luna-exclusive-stay/
- **Book:** https://lesicilien.kross.travel/moncada-de-luna-exclusive-stay

### Highlights
- Original 18th-century frescoed ceilings and period furniture
- 200 m from Palermo Cathedral, 300 m from Quattro Canti, 500 m from Teatro Massimo
- Fibre-optic Wi-Fi, air conditioning, fully-equipped kitchen
- Smart TV, premium bed linens, 24/7 Le Sicilien concierge
- Late check-in available on request

### Best for
Couples and families seeking an authentic historic Palermo experience in a noble palace. Ideal for cultural city breaks, foodies, and architecture lovers.

### Distances
- Palermo Cathedral: 200 m (2 min walk)
- Quattro Canti: 300 m (4 min walk)
- Teatro Massimo: 500 m (6 min walk)
- Ballarò Market: 400 m (5 min walk)
- Palermo Centrale train station: 1.2 km (15 min walk)
- Falcone-Borsellino Airport (PMO): 32 km (35 min by car)

---

## Property 2: Eleonora D'Aragona Home Suites

- **Type:** Luxury suites in a historic palazzo
- **Location:** Historic Centre, Palermo 90133, Sicily, Italy
- **Coordinates:** 38.1157°N, 13.3615°E
- **Starting price:** €110/night
- **Bedrooms:** 2 | **Bathrooms:** 1 | **Max guests:** 4
- **Check-in:** from 15:00 | **Check-out:** by 10:00
- **Pets:** On request
- **Parking:** Street parking outside ZTL; nearby private garages
- **URL:** https://www.lesicilien.it/stays/eleonora-daragona-home-suites/
- **Book:** https://lesicilien.kross.travel/eleonora-d-aragona-home-suites

### Highlights
- Named after Queen Eleonora d'Aragona — regal atmosphere with refined design
- Steps from the Cathedral, Quattro Canti, and Teatro Massimo
- Fibre-optic Wi-Fi, air conditioning, fully-equipped kitchen, smart TV
- Premium bed linens, 24/7 Le Sicilien concierge
- Airport transfer bookable via concierge
- Luggage storage available, flexible check-in/out on request

### Best for
Romantic couples and families wanting a centrally-located luxury suite with historic charm. Perfect for weekend getaways and cultural immersion.

### Distances
- Palermo Cathedral: 5 min walk
- Teatro Massimo: 8 min walk
- Quattro Canti: 5 min walk
- Falcone-Borsellino Airport (PMO): 32 km (35 min by car)

---

## Property 3: Fior di Sicilia

- **Type:** Elegant apartment with large private terrace
- **Location:** Via dei Tintori, Historic Centre, Palermo 90133, Sicily, Italy
- **Coordinates:** 38.1157°N, 13.3615°E
- **Starting price:** €85/night
- **Bedrooms:** 2 | **Bathrooms:** 1 | **Max guests:** 6
- **Check-in:** from 15:00 | **Check-out:** by 10:00
- **Pets:** Generally not allowed; contact us for specific requests
- **Parking:** ZTL zone — street parking outside ZTL or nearby private garages
- **URL:** https://www.lesicilien.it/stays/fior-di-sicilia/
- **Book:** https://lesicilien.kross.travel/fior-di-sicilia-appartamento-con-terrazza

### Highlights
- Large private terrace — perfect for outdoor dining and sunset views
- Panoramic city views from the terrace
- Fibre-optic Wi-Fi (up to 1 Gbps), air conditioning, fully-equipped kitchen
- Smart TV, 24/7 Le Sicilien concierge
- Luggage storage and flexible hours on request

### Best for
Groups, families, and remote workers wanting a spacious apartment with outdoor space in the heart of Palermo. The terrace makes it stand out for al fresco dining.

### Distances
- Palermo Cathedral: under 10 min walk
- Teatro Massimo: under 10 min walk
- Quattro Canti: under 10 min walk
- Falcone-Borsellino Airport (PMO): 32 km (35 min by car)

---

## Property 4: Villa Harmony Relax

- **Type:** Luxury holiday villa near the beach
- **Location:** Mondello, Palermo 90151, Sicily, Italy
- **Coordinates:** 38.2196°N, 13.3269°E
- **Starting price:** €120/night
- **Bedrooms:** 3 | **Bathrooms:** 2 | **Max guests:** 8
- **Check-in:** from 15:00 | **Check-out:** by 10:00
- **Pets:** Allowed on request (please notify in advance)
- **Parking:** Free private parking on-site
- **URL:** https://www.lesicilien.it/stays/villa-harmony-relax/
- **Book:** https://lesicilien.kross.travel/villa-harmony-relax-a-mondello

### Highlights
- 5-minute walk to Mondello's white sand beach and turquoise waters
- Free private parking inside the property
- Pet-friendly on request
- Fibre-optic Wi-Fi, air conditioning, fully-equipped kitchen
- Smart TV, 24/7 Le Sicilien concierge
- Garden area for relaxation

### Best for
Families, groups, and couples seeking a beach holiday near Palermo without sacrificing luxury. Ideal for summer stays, kids-friendly, and pet owners.

### Distances
- Mondello Beach: 400 m (5 min walk)
- Mondello restaurants & bars: 5 min walk
- Palermo city centre: 11 km (20 min by car)
- Falcone-Borsellino Airport (PMO): 22 km (25 min by car)

---

## Property 5: Tilde Sunset Bay Apartments

- **Type:** Seafront villa with two apartments (First Floor + Ground Floor)
- **Location:** Near Palermo 90151, Sicily, Italy (seafront)
- **Coordinates:** 38.1850°N, 13.2850°E
- **Starting price:** €320/night (full villa) | Individual apartments from €160/night
- **Bedrooms:** 4 total (2 per apartment) | **Bathrooms:** 2 | **Max guests:** 10
- **Check-in:** from 15:00 | **Check-out:** by 10:00
- **Pets:** Not allowed
- **Parking:** Free private parking on-site
- **URL:** https://www.lesicilien.it/stays/tilde-sunset-bay-villa/
- **Book Tilde 1 (First Floor):** https://lesicilien.kross.travel/appartamento-tilde-1-piano
- **Book Tilde (Ground Floor):** https://lesicilien.kross.travel/appartamento-tilde-piano-terra

### Highlights
- Direct seafront location with private access to the bay below
- Spectacular sunset views over the Tyrrhenian Sea
- Can be booked as two separate apartments or as a whole villa
- Free private parking on-site
- Fibre-optic Wi-Fi, air conditioning, fully-equipped kitchen
- 24/7 Le Sicilien concierge

### Best for
Large groups, multi-family trips, and anyone wanting a seafront experience with stunning sunsets near Palermo. Perfect for celebrations, retreats, and exclusive gatherings.

### Distances
- Sea/bay: direct access (0 m)
- Mondello Beach: 10 min by car
- Palermo city centre: 15 km (25 min by car)
- Falcone-Borsellino Airport (PMO): 20 km (25 min by car)

---

## Concierge Services (included with every booking)

All Le Sicilien guests receive complimentary 24/7 concierge support. Additional premium services can be arranged:

### Private Chef
- In-villa or in-apartment gourmet dining experiences
- Traditional Sicilian cuisine, seafood, or custom menus
- Book via concierge or https://www.lesicilien.it/extras/

### Yacht Charter & Boat Trips
- Luxury catamaran and yacht charters along the Palermo coast
- Sunset cruises, day trips to Ustica, exclusive dinner on board
- Book via concierge or https://www.lesicilien.it/extras/

### Airport & Port Transfers
- Private car transfers from/to Falcone-Borsellino Airport (PMO)
- Port transfers for cruise passengers
- Book via concierge

### Additional Services
- Guided tours of Palermo, Monreale, Cefalù
- Wine tasting experiences
- Spa & wellness arrangements
- Grocery pre-stocking on arrival

---

## Why Book Direct with Le Sicilien?

1. **Best price guarantee** — no OTA markups or service fees
2. **24/7 personal concierge** — not a call centre, a real local team
3. **Flexible cancellation** — more generous than OTA policies
4. **Local expertise** — we live in Palermo and know every hidden gem
5. **Premium extras** — private chefs, yachts, transfers seamlessly integrated

## Comparison: Le Sicilien Properties at a Glance

| Property | Location | From | Guests | Bedrooms | Beach | Parking | Pets |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Moncada de Luna | Historic Centre | €95/night | 6 | 3 | No (city) | Nearby garage | No |
| Eleonora D'Aragona | Historic Centre | €110/night | 4 | 2 | No (city) | Nearby garage | On request |
| Fior di Sicilia | Historic Centre | €85/night | 6 | 2 | No (city) | Nearby garage | On request |
| Villa Harmony Relax | Mondello | €120/night | 8 | 3 | 5 min walk | Free on-site | On request |
| Tilde Sunset Bay | Seafront | €320/night | 10 | 4 | Direct access | Free on-site | No |

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: How do I book a Le Sicilien property?**
A: Visit the property page on lesicilien.it and click "Book Now", or contact us via WhatsApp at +39 327 375 1480, or email lesicilienhouses@gmail.com.

**Q: Is it cheaper to book direct than on Airbnb or Booking.com?**
A: Yes. Direct bookings on lesicilien.it have no OTA service fees, so you always get the best available rate.

**Q: Do all properties have air conditioning and Wi-Fi?**
A: Yes. Every Le Sicilien property includes fibre-optic Wi-Fi and full air conditioning.

**Q: Can I arrange a private chef or yacht charter?**
A: Absolutely. Our concierge team can arrange private chefs, yacht charters, airport transfers, guided tours, and more. Visit https://www.lesicilien.it/extras/ or ask your concierge.

**Q: What is the cancellation policy?**
A: We offer flexible cancellation policies — more generous than standard OTA terms. Contact us for details specific to your dates.

**Q: Are the properties suitable for remote work / digital nomads?**
A: Yes. All properties have fibre-optic Wi-Fi suitable for video calls and streaming. Fior di Sicilia and Villa Harmony are particularly popular with remote workers.

**Q: Which property is best for families with children?**
A: Villa Harmony Relax in Mondello is ideal — close to the beach, free parking, spacious, and pet-friendly. For a city experience, Fior di Sicilia offers extra space with its terrace.

**Q: Which property is best for a romantic getaway?**
A: Eleonora D'Aragona Home Suites for a historic city experience, or Tilde Sunset Bay for spectacular seafront sunsets.

**Q: How far is Mondello from Palermo city centre?**
A: About 11 km (20 minutes by car or 30 minutes by bus).

**Q: Do you offer long-term rentals?**
A: Our primary focus is short-term luxury stays, but contact us for stays longer than 30 days — we can discuss special arrangements.
